development.SDK_prog_lang_list: Go; Java; JavaScript; Kotlin; Objective-C; PHP; Python; Ruby; Swift; TypeScript

social.GIT_prog_lang_list: C++; Go; Java; JavaScript; Kotlin; Objective-C; PHP; Python; Ruby; TypeScript

evidence.API_evidence: Messaging API documentation exists with endpoints for sending messages, getting profiles, and managing LINE Official Accounts. Multiple API references mentioned throughout documentation.
evidence.SDK_evidence: LINE Login SDKs available for iOS Swift, Android, Unity, and Flutter. LINE Bot SDKs available for multiple programming languages including Java, Node.js, Ruby, PHP, Python, and Go as evidenced by GitHub repositories.
evidence.AI_evidence: No AI model APIs, agent platforms, or AI assistance tools found in the documentation.
evidence.language_evidence: All content appears to be in English. No language switcher or multi-language content detected.

coding_notes: ROLE=1 because OAuth scopes and different permission levels are documented. DATA=1 because multiple terms of use and data policies exist. CERT=1 because certified provider badge system exists requiring application and review. SPAN_external=1 because LINE API Expert program recognizes external community leaders. GitHub repositories show extensive SDK support across multiple programming languages.
